info.title: TexQtic Control Plane API
info.description: Admin-facing control plane API for TexQtic multi-tenant SaaS platform. All endpoints require admin JWT authentication.

TenantObject.description: Tenant identity object as returned by control-plane tenant endpoints.

tenant_category.description: Canonical tenant identity category. Derived from organizations.org_type.

is_white_label.description: Indicates whether the tenant operates as a white-label environment. Derived from organizations.is_white_label.

get.description: Returns all tenants with membership counts and related data

post.description: Admin-initiated tenant creation. This is the ONLY way to create tenants - no public signup.

get.description: Returns detailed tenant information including memberships, domains, branding, and AI budget
Returns audit logs across all tenants or filtered by tenant/action. Admin-only.
Query event log backbone with filtering and cursor pagination. Doctrine v1.4 event read surface.
SUPER_ADMIN-only bounded visibility into current internal control-plane admin identities and role posture.

delete.description: SUPER_ADMIN-only bounded revoke/remove for an existing non-SUPER_ADMIN control-plane admin target. Self-revoke and peer-SUPER_ADMIN revoke are forbidden.

get.description: Admin-only endpoint to retrieve all feature flags

put.description: Admin-only endpoint to create or update a feature flag. Wave 5A implementation.

get.description: Read-only projection of cart summaries with filtering and pagination. Admin-only cross-tenant visibility.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Filter by tenant ID (omit to see all tenants)

200.description: Cart summaries retrieved with pagination metadata

get.summary: Get cart summary by cart ID
get.description: Retrieve a single cart summary from the projection table. Admin bypasses tenant isolation.

post.description: Wave 5B: Record admin approval decision as immutable event (no payout execution).

422.description: Validation error (missing Idempotency-Key or invalid body)

post.description: Wave 5B: Record admin rejection decision as immutable event.

422.description: Validation error (missing Idempotency-Key or invalid body)

post.description: Wave 5B: Record admin approval decision as immutable event.

422.description: Validation error (missing Idempotency-Key or invalid body)

post.description: Wave 5B: Record admin rejection decision as immutable event.

422.description: Validation error (missing Idempotency-Key or invalid body)

post.description: Wave 5B: Record admin resolution decision as immutable event.

422.description: Validation error (missing Idempotency-Key or invalid body)

post.description: Wave 5B: Record admin escalation decision as immutable event.

422.description: Validation error (missing Idempotency-Key or invalid body)

get.description: Returns platform trades across all tenants. Optional query filters: tenantId, status, limit, offset. D-017-A: tenantId is an admin filter on the server query — never a client-supplied tenant identity in a request body. TECS-FBW-002-A (2026-03-07).

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Admin filter — restrict results to one tenant (D-017-A: admin query param only)

get.summary: List G-022 escalation events for an org (admin cross-org read, read-only)
get.description: Returns escalation_events rows for the specified org. orgId is MANDATORY — API returns 400 if absent. Optional filters: entityType, entityId, status, limit. D-022-C: freezeRecommendation is informational only; no kill-switch side-effects. TECS-FBW-006-A (2026-03-11).

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Target organisation ID (mandatory) — admin cross-org read boundary

400.description: Bad request — orgId missing or invalid

post.description: Raises a new escalation event for a specified org. Admin provides orgId in the request body. D-022-C: freezeRecommendation is informational only. TECS-FBW-006-A.

get.summary: List certifications across tenants (admin read-only — D-022-C)
Get single certification by ID (admin read-only — D-022-C)

200.description: Admin certification detail including isTerminal flag

get.summary: Cross-tenant node list — admin read-only (TECS-FBW-015 / G-016 / Phase A)

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Optional org filter (D-017-A: filter only, not identity assertion)

get.summary: Cross-tenant edge list — admin read-only (TECS-FBW-015 / G-016 / Phase A)

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: Optional org filter (D-017-A: filter only, not identity assertion)

get.description: Returns pending_approvals rows visible to the authenticated admin. G-021 maker-checker read surface.
Returns a single pending_approvals record by ID.

post.description: Records a MAKER or CHECKER signature on a pending_approvals record. G-021.
Re-executes the underlying operation once all maker-checker signatures are collected. G-021.

get.description: Returns escrow accounts across all tenants. Optional tenantId filter. Admin RLS bypass (is_admin=true). D-020-B: balance is ledger-derived.
Returns escrow account detail and recent transactions. Admin RLS bypass allows cross-tenant read. D-020-B: balance is derived.

post.summary: Admin escrow lifecycle transition (G-021 Fix B)
post.description: Admin-initiated escrow state machine transition. orgId must be supplied in the body. MakerCheckerService injected — PENDING_APPROVAL transitions create pending_approvals rows. D-022-B: freeze gate enforced.
Non-mutating balance check for a cross-tenant settlement. Admin provides tenantId in body. D-020-B: balance always derived from ledger SUM.

get.description: Returns durable applied settlement ledger rows (escrow_transactions where entry_type=RELEASE AND direction=DEBIT) across all tenants. Cursor-based pagination ordered by created_at DESC, id DESC. TOGGLE_B=B1: monetary truth is the escrow ledger; no settlement table exists. Optional filters: tenantId, escrowId, referenceId, dateFrom, dateTo. Admin RLS bypass (is_admin=true). PW5-W3 (2026-03-12).

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Admin filter — restrict results to one tenant (D-017-A: admin query param only, never a body identity claim)

parameters.name: referenceId
parameters.description: Exact match on idempotency/reconciliation key (e.g. SETTLEMENT:{batchId})

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date-time — return rows with created_at >= dateFrom

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: ISO 8601 date-time — return rows with created_at <= dateTo

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor. Obtain from pagination.nextCursor of a previous response.

post.description: Applies a settlement debit to the escrow ledger and transitions trade/escrow state. Admin provides tenantId in body. D-020-B: preview (wouldSucceed=true) required first.
Increases the severity level of an existing escalation event. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. G-022.

post.summary: Resolve or override an escalation event (SUPER_ADMIN)
post.description: Marks an escalation as RESOLVED or OVERRIDDEN. Requires SUPER_ADMIN role. G-022.

422.description: Validation error or override severity threshold violation

post.summary: Admin trade lifecycle transition (G-021 Fix A2)
post.description: Admin-initiated trade state machine transition. orgId must be supplied in body. MakerCheckerService injected. D-017-A: admin supplies tenantId explicitly; service re-validates.

get.description: Returns payout-related authority intent events from the event log. Backed by EventLog.
Returns compliance-related authority intent events from the event log. Backed by EventLog.
Returns dispute-related authority intent events from the event log. Backed by EventLog.
Returns the calling admin's identity and capability context. No DB access — derived from verified JWT only.
Returns computed system health including database connectivity. Admin-only endpoint.
Returns Gemini configuration status for the control-plane AI surface. SUPER_ADMIN only. No model invocation is performed. PW5-G028-C1.

post.description: Executes a platform-level AI insight for SUPER_ADMIN. PII redaction applied pre-send; output scanned for PII. Reasoning persisted in admin audit metadataJson (not reasoning_logs). Optionally targets a specific org via targetOrgId (Slice 2, PW5-G028-C2) — server-validated; not an auth-elevation signal. Requests without targetOrgId use platform-global mode (Slice 1 behavior).

focus.description: Optional context hint appended to prompt (e.g. 'platform-health', 'usage-trends').

targetOrgId.description: Slice 2 (PW5-G028-C2): optional UUID of a specific org to target. Server-validated via DB lookup before use. Not an auth-elevation signal — SUPER_ADMIN gate is unconditional. When absent, request is platform-global (Slice 1 behavior).

slice.description: G028-C1 for platform-global requests; G028-C2 for targeted-org requests.

targetOrgId.description: Present only when targeted-org mode was activated (Slice 2).

400.description: Validation error (invalid body, UUID format failure, etc.)

401.description: Unauthorized — admin JWT missing or invalid

404.description: Target org not found — targetOrgId does not match any tenant
